title: Mid-Semester Exam Schedule Released
content: Mid-semester exams will be held from Feb 15-22, 2026. Please check the timetable on the portal.

title: Annual Tech Fest - ZenHack 2026
content: ZenHack 2026 registration is open. 48-hour hackathon on March 15-16. Register via the events portal.

title: Library Hours Extended
content: Library will remain open until 10 PM during exam season (Feb 10 - April 30).

title: CSE Department Workshop on AI/ML
content: 2-day workshop on Generative AI and LLMs by Prof. Priya Krishnan. Date: Feb 20-21. Venue: Seminar Hall.

title: Placement Drive - TCS, Infosys, Wipro
content: Campus placement drive for 2026 batch. Companies: TCS, Infosys, Wipro. Date: March 5-7. Eligibility: 7.0+ GPA.

title: Fee Payment Deadline Extended
content: Last date for semester fee payment extended to March 1, 2026. Late fee of Rs.500 per day after deadline.

title: ECE Lab Equipment Maintenance
content: ECE labs will be closed on Feb 25 for equipment maintenance. All lab sessions rescheduled to Feb 27.

title: Sports Day 2026
content: Annual Sports Day on March 10. Registrations open for track, field, indoor games. Contact your class rep.

title: Final Exam Timetable Published
content: Final semester exams scheduled April 15-30, 2026. Detailed timetable available on the portal.

title: IT Department Guest Lecture - Big Data
content: Guest lecture on Big Data Analytics by industry expert. Date: March 8. Venue: LH-102.

title: Summer Internship Applications Open
content: Apply for summer internships via the placement portal. Deadline: March 20. Min GPA: 6.5.

title: ME Department Industrial Visit
content: Industrial visit to Tata Motors plant on March 25. Limited seats. Sign up with Prof. Anil Patel.
